sourceText: Yasawi overcame this by pioneering the use of the vernacular Turkic language for religious poetry. His 'Diwan-i-Hikmet' (Book of Wisdom) used familiar poetic forms and simple language to convey the core tenets of Sufi love and ethics, making them accessible and resonant for a vast audience.
translatedText: Yasawi ya shawo kan hakan ne ta hanyar fara amfani da harshen Turkawa wajen yin wakokin addini. 'Diwan-i-Hikmet' nasa (Littafin Hikima) ya yi amfani da nau'ikan wakoki da aka saba da su da kuma harshe mai sauƙi don isar da ainihin ƙa'idodin soyayya da ɗabi'a na Sufaye, yana mai da su damar isa ga ɗimbin masu sauraro.

sourceText: He who is without love is without faith.
translatedText: Wanda ba shi da ƙauna ba shi da bangaskiya.

sourceText: This emphasizes that the core of true faith lies in a deep and sincere love for God and all of creation. Love is the foundation of the spiritual journey.
translatedText: Wannan yana nanata cewa ainihin bangaskiya ta gaskiya tana cikin ƙauna mai zurfi da gaske ga Allah da dukan halitta. Ƙauna ita ce ginshiƙin tafiya ta ruhaniya.

sourceText: Listen to the words of the wise and act upon them; flee from the ignorant and go far away.
translatedText: Ka kasa kunne ga maganar masu hikima, ka aikata su. Ku guje wa jahilai, ku yi nisa.

sourceText: This teaches the importance of seeking guidance from wise teachers for spiritual growth and avoiding ignorant, worldly influences that darken the soul.
translatedText: Wannan yana karantar da mahimmancin neman shiriya daga malamai masu hikima don haɓaka ruhi da nisantar jahilci, tasirin duniya masu duhun rai.

sourceText: Those who love the world cannot say they truly love God.
translatedText: Waɗanda suke ƙaunar duniya ba za su iya cewa suna ƙaunar Allah da gaske ba.

sourceText: This indicates the incompatibility of attachment to the transient world with devotion to the eternal God. The true spiritual path requires transcending worldly desires.
translatedText: Wannan yana nuna rashin daidaituwar ma'amala da duniya mai wucewa tare da sadaukarwa ga Allah madawwami. Hanya ta ruhaniya ta gaskiya tana buƙatar wuce sha'awar duniya.

sourceText: Originally the heir to the throne, she was sidelined by the birth of her younger brother. After her father's death, her plot to overthrow her brother and install her husband as emperor failed, leading to her loss of everything and confinement in a monastery.
translatedText: Asalin gadon sarautar ta kasance a gefe saboda haihuwar ƙanenta. Bayan rasuwar mahaifinta, makircin da ta yi na hambarar da dan uwanta, ta nada mijinta a matsayin sarki, ya ci tura, wanda hakan ya sa ta yi asarar komai, aka tsare ta a gidan ibada.

sourceText: During her exile in the monastery, she transformed her grief and anger into scholarship. By writing 'The Alexiad,' a history of her father's reign, she immortalized herself as a historian.
translatedText: A lokacin da take gudun hijira a gidan sufi, ta mayar da bakin ciki da fushinta zuwa guraben karatu. Ta rubuta 'The Alexiad,' tarihin mulkin mahaifinta, ta dawwama a matsayin mai tarihi.

sourceText: For one purpose, and one only, do I write this, to solace my own grief.
translatedText: Don manufa ɗaya, kuma ɗaya kaɗai, na rubuta wannan, don tausasa baƙin cikina.

sourceText: In the preface to the 'Alexiad,' she frankly states that her motivation for writing history was to overcome the personal sorrow and pain of her political defeat.
translatedText: A cikin gabatarwar 'Alexiad,' ta faɗi a zahiri cewa dalilinta na rubuta tarihi shine don shawo kan baƙin ciki da zafin shan kaye na siyasa.

sourceText: For history, I think, is a kind of safeguard, and a treasury of the deeds of the past.
translatedText: Don tarihi, ina tsammanin, wani nau'i ne na kariya, kuma taskar ayyukan da suka gabata.

sourceText: She viewed history as a vital means of preserving and evaluating the deeds of the past, intending to provide lessons for future generations.
translatedText: Ta dauki tarihi a matsayin muhimmiyar hanyar kiyayewa da tantance ayyukan da aka yi a baya, da nufin samar da darasi ga al'umma masu zuwa.
